name: Senseair → Background Calibration
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) initiates a background calibration on the sensor with the given ID: the current CO2 level will be used as a reference for the 400ppm threshold. Ensure that the sensor is in a stable environment with fresh ambient air, preferably near a window that has already been opened for a sufficient time.
